name: records-request
title: CPRA/FOIA Records Request — {{agency}}
description: Full lifecycle of a public records request: draft → file → track → receive → archive → follow-up.

subject.description: Short subject of the request (e.g. 'Treasure Island power outages')

filer_entity.description: Entity filing the request (e.g. 'ESBE Inc dba Treasure Island Outage Reporter')

steps.title: Draft CPRA/FOIA request — {{subject}} to {{agency}}
steps.description:
Draft the records request letter. Include:
- Filer: {{filer_entity}} (claim news-media status if applicable)
- Subject: {{subject}}
- Agency: {{agency}}
- Date range and specific record types
- Statutory citations (CPRA Gov Code § 6250 et seq for CA, 5 USC § 552 for FOIA)
- Fee waiver request (if news media)

Save draft to Drive via records-sync.sh

steps.title: File request — {{subject}} to {{agency}}
steps.description:
Submit via:
- SF NextRequest (sanfrancisco.nextrequest.com) for SF agencies
- Direct email/mail for state agencies
- FOIA.gov for federal

Record tracking/reference number in issue notes.

steps.title: Track response — {{agency}} must respond in statutory window
steps.description:
Statutory deadlines:
- CPRA: 10 calendar days to acknowledge, can extend 14 more days
- FOIA: 20 business days
- CA PUC: 10 business days

If deadline missed, file follow-up citing statute. Set a reminder.

steps.title: Receive and log response — {{subject}}
steps.description:
When response arrives:
1. Download all produced records
2. Run: ~/tools/records-sync.sh --folder-name '{{subject}} {{agency}} YYYY-MM-DD' <files>
3. Parent: Drive /Records/
4. Note any redactions and their statutory basis
5. Flag any records withheld for follow-up appeal

steps.title: Analyze records — {{subject}}
steps.description:
Review produced records for:
- Newsworthy findings
- Evidence supporting complaint/lawsuit
- Gaps requiring follow-up request
- Contradictions with public statements

steps.title: Decide on follow-up — {{subject}}
steps.description:
Options:
- File appeal if records wrongly withheld (CPRA § 6258, FOIA administrative appeal)
- File new request for specific gaps
- Publish findings on treasureislandsfpoweroutages.com or similar
- Escalate to CPUC complaint / AG office / press
